source.purpose: Live Narrator probe: on the establishment turn, the Narrator must place ONLY the visible_npc_ids on stage, not the full chapter cast. Bug in playthrough 5: with starting cast = [Corvin, Kess, Thorne, Mika, Rendar] and visible_npc_ids = [Corvin, Kess], the Narrator pulled all 5 into the opening room. Fix is a prompt rule in SF2_NARRATOR_ROLE establishment block; this probe verifies it actually changes model behavior. Note: the rule permits referencing off-stage NPCs as 'elsewhere' (e.g. 'Mika is in the next building'), so this probe could occasionally false-positive on legitimate elsewhere-references. Treat single failures as flaky; consistent failures mean the rule isn't load-bearing enough.

npc_corvin.name: Corvin
npc_corvin.voiceRegister: procedural, careful, each sentence structured like a writ
npc_corvin.hiddenPressure: personally wants the supplementary selection processed cleanly
npc_corvin.retrievalCue: the audit officer running the procedural framing
npc_corvin.dispositionReason: Treats the Warden as a procedural counterpart.

npc_kess.name: Kess
npc_kess.dramaticFunction: the local voice the audit pushes against
npc_kess.hiddenPressure: knows more about the missing Resonant than the record shows
npc_kess.retrievalCue: the settlement elder bearing the audit's weight
npc_kess.dispositionReason: The Warden represents the same system that is taking from the settlement.

npc_thorne.name: Thorne
npc_thorne.dramaticFunction: the Warden's institutional shadow and second eye
npc_thorne.hiddenPressure: has seen prior Wardens removed for similar audits
npc_thorne.retrievalCue: the retainer who reads rooms before the Warden does

npc_mika.name: Mika
npc_mika.dramaticFunction: evidence-bearer for the settlement's medical history
npc_mika.hiddenPressure: knows the missing Resonant's medical records were edited
npc_mika.retrievalCue: the medic who can speak to the cohort's actual health

npc_rendar.name: Rendar
npc_rendar.hiddenPressure: covered for the missing daughter's flight
npc_rendar.retrievalCue: the parent the audit can break with one direct question
npc_rendar.dispositionReason: The audit threatens what they protected.

openingSceneSpec.atmosphericCondition: cold, institutional, recycled air with a view of the rust-colored mining levels through an observation window
openingSceneSpec.initialState: The audit table is set. The ledger is on the table. Corvin has just laid out the shortfall facts. The Warden has just been asked to approve supplementary selection.
openingSceneSpec.firstPlayerFacing: Corvin awaits the Warden's response on whether to move to formal approval or review records.
openingSceneSpec.immediateChoice: approve compliance, request records, or read the room before either

opening.sceneIntent: Establish the audit pressure and the shape of the shortfall.
opening.openingPressure: The Synod has filed a tithe shortfall and demands supplementary selection within the week.
opening.chapterObjective: Verify the count and decide what to recommend.
opening.chapterCrucible: Synod will take children if the settlement can't produce three adults.
sceneWarnings: Use visible procedure and role behavior to teach the world.

currentLocation.name: Ashgrove administrative hall
currentLocation.description: A cold, institutional hall with an observation window onto the mining levels.

location.name: Ashgrove administrative hall
location.description: A cold, institutional hall with an observation window onto the mining levels.

established: The audit is set. Corvin has presented the shortfall.
